about.title: About RentKSA
about.subtitle: Making car rental simple, transparent, and fair across Saudi Arabia
about.storyText: RentKSA was founded with a simple idea: car rental should be transparent. No hidden fees, no confusing pricing. Just honest per-kilometer rates that let you pay for exactly what you use.
about.step1Text: Browse our curated fleet and pick the car that fits your needs and budget.
about.step2Text: Enter your pickup and destination. See the estimated distance and total price instantly.
about.step3Text: Complete your booking in seconds. Pick up your car and enjoy the ride.
about.why1Text: Pay only for the kilometers you drive. No hidden charges, no surprises.
about.why2Text: Well-maintained vehicles from trusted brands, inspected before every rental.
about.why3Text: Choose from locations across the Kingdom. Airport, city center, or delivered to you.
about.why4Text: Our team is always available. Roadside assistance included with every booking.
about.missionText: To become the most trusted car rental platform in Saudi Arabia by offering fair pricing, quality vehicles, and outstanding service to every customer.

whyUs.title: Why Rent With Us
whyUs.subtitle: Built for drivers who value clarity and convenience
whyUs.reason1Text: Only pay for the distance you actually drive. Our pricing is simple and fair.
whyUs.reason2Text: From economy to luxury, find the right car for every occasion and budget.
whyUs.reason3Text: Know your trip cost before you book. No surprises at pickup or return.
whyUs.reason4Text: Book in minutes. Flexible pickup locations across the Kingdom.

addCarCta.title: Own a Car? Start Earning
